subcodes.first_line: Thy name hath been mentioned in the presence of the Wronged One, and this Most Holy, Most Exalted Tablet hath been revealed for the sake of God, that it may draw thee and His loved ones unto Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسمت نزد مظلوم مذکور و این لوح امنع اقدس لوجه الله نازل لیجذبک و اولیائه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa], @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
